vocab.example: I have five days of annual leave left this year.
vocab.example_vi: Năm nay tôi còn năm ngày phép năm.

vocab.example: She's on sick leave today because of a bad cold.
vocab.example_vi: Hôm nay cô ấy nghỉ ốm vì bị cảm nặng.

vocab.example: Can you cover for me while I'm away next week?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể làm thay tôi khi tôi vắng mặt tuần sau không?

vocab.example: I'll hand over my tasks to Linh before I leave.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi sẽ bàn giao việc cho Linh trước khi nghỉ.

vocab.example: My manager still needs to approve my leave request.
vocab.example_vi: Quản lý của tôi vẫn cần phê duyệt đơn xin nghỉ.

vocab.example: I'd like to take a day off next Monday.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi muốn xin nghỉ một ngày vào thứ Hai tới.

vocab.example: Please request leave at least three days in advance.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng xin nghỉ trước ít nhất ba ngày.

vocab.example: I need tomorrow off for an urgent family matter.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi cần nghỉ ngày mai vì có việc gấp trong gia đình.

listening.title: Asking the manager for a day off

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Excuse me, Ms. Hoa. Could I talk to you about my annual leave?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Of course, Minh. How many days do you want to take?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Just one day off next Monday. It's an urgent family matter.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: I see. I'm sorry to hear that. Have you told your team already?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Not yet, but I'll hand over my tasks to Nam this afternoon.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Good. Can he cover for you on the client call as well?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Yes, he already agreed. I know it's short notice, not in advance like usual.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: That's fine this time. I'll approve your request today.

questions.q: How many days off does Minh ask for?
Why does Minh need the day off?
Who will cover for Minh on the client call?

shadowing: Could I take a day off next Monday, please?
I'll hand over my tasks before I leave.
Can you cover for me while I'm on leave?
I'm sorry for the short notice, it's an urgent matter.
My manager still needs to approve my leave request.
